summary: Frontend testing completed for Travito UI changes. All 10 requested features verified successfully: 1) Hero section has clean white/grey gradient background (no hero image), 2) Main heading 'Compare the best Visa options' is orange, 3) Search box is centered, 4) Only ONE visa card (Explore Agents) appears after search, 5) Assisted card correctly removed, 6) Explore button renamed from 'Find Agents' to 'Explore', 7) VISA INTELLIGENCE heading is orange, 8) TOP DESTINATIONS heading is orange, 9) Travel Guide button is orange, 10) Eligibility and Checklist buttons are grey with orange icons.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with clean white/grey gradient background (bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100)
Main heading 'Compare the best Visa options' is orange (text-orange-500)
Search box is centered with flex items-center justify-center
Search for 'Japan' - only ONE visa card appears (Explore Agents)
Assisted card is NOT present (correctly removed)
Explore Agents card button says 'Explore' (not 'Find Agents')
Check Eligibility button is grey (bg-gray-100) with orange icon (text-orange-500)
Document Checklist button is grey (bg-gray-100) with orange icon (text-orange-500)
Explore Agents card has 'Most Popular' badge
Explore Agents card shows correct pricing (₹7,999) and processing time (3-4 days)
critical_code_review_comments: Hero section correctly uses bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100 (no background image)
Only Explore Agents card rendered - Assisted card code removed
Button text changed from 'Find Agents' to 'Explore'
All section headings (VISA INTELLIGENCE, TOP DESTINATIONS) use text-orange-500
Action buttons follow correct color scheme: Travel Guide (orange), Eligibility/Checklist (grey with orange icons)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI changes verified: 1) Hero section has white/grey gradient (no background image), 2) Main heading is orange, 3) Search box centered, 4) Only 1 visa card (Explore Agents) after search - Assisted removed, 5) Button renamed to 'Explore', 6) All section headings orange, 7) Travel Guide button orange, 8) Eligibility/Checklist buttons grey with orange icons.
